description: A cream flat UI banner with black outline and small orange side tabs, likely used as a title label or notification header.
A cream flat UI banner with black outline and bracket-like orange end caps, suitable for headings or menu labels.
A long cream rectangular banner with black and orange border accents, likely used for titles or panel headers.
A cream rectangular banner with heavy black outline and orange top-left accent, suitable for UI captions or menu headers.
A simple cream horizontal bar with thick black outline, likely used as an empty progress or health bar frame.
A cream horizontal bar frame with black outline and small black tick blocks along the top edge.
A cream horizontal bar with black border and multiple top tick marks, useful for segmented meters or status gauges.
A cream outlined horizontal bar with a centered top notch marker, suitable for slider or meter decoration.
A cream horizontal progress frame with a subtle checker fill and black outline, likely used as an empty status bar.
A thin cream horizontal bar with black outline and orange lower accent, suitable for compact progress indicators.

A dark gray horizontal fill strip for disabled, empty, or inactive progress bars.
